lessons: WRONG fix (carried from hebrew-legal-research #3): the 'first Amendment-13 enforcement' was stated as a NIS 70,000 fine on HOT. It was actually a NIS 75,000 fine on an INDIVIDUAL (a former National Insurance Institute employee) for unauthorized retrieval of sensitive data from Bituach Leumi databases. Fixed in SKILL.md, SKILL_HE.md, evidence.json (sourced to israelhayom).

WRONG fix (the big one): the skill asserted a GDPR-style 72-hour breach-notification deadline in 7 places and wrongly attributed it to Amendment 13. Israel has NO fixed 72-hour deadline: a 'Severe Security Incident' is reported to the PPA 'immediately' (miyad) under the Data Security Regulations (2017, which predate Amendment 13). Fixed SKILL.md (Step 5, GDPR-comparison table, gotcha), SKILL_HE (3 places), references/privacy-law-requirements.md (3 places), and evidence.json. Verified via Chambers 2026 + Baker McKenzie; consistent with sister skill hebrew-legal-research.

Dead source replaced: ai-law.co.il enforcement post now 404s (was the source for the HOT fine + the 3.2M aggregate). Repointed to israelhayom (NII fine), IAPP (3.2M aggregate), and Chambers 2026 (breach rule + turnover cap).

GAPS added (expert-flagged, were missing): the 5%-of-annual-turnover cap on administrative fines (with a separate lower ceiling for small/micro businesses) and the new private right of action for statutory damages up to NIS 100,000 per person WITHOUT proof of harm (distinct from the administrative fine).

VERIFIED OK (no change): in force 2025-08-14, DPO grace ended 2025-10-31, per-violation fines 1,000-320,000 / 640,000 doubled / ~3.2M aggregate, per-data-subject NIS 100, registration narrowed to public bodies + data brokers (10,000+) plus the 100,000-record especially-sensitive 30-day notification tier, three security levels, criminal liability up to 5 years, 2026 PPA enforcement priorities.
CARRY (MINOR): Knesset-approval date of Amendment 13 is stated as 2024-08-05; some sources say 2024-08-08. Sources disagree; verify against the Knesset record next cycle.

Word-count: SKILL.md was already near the 5,000-word cap; the gap additions pushed it over and required condensing filler + a duplicated registration paragraph back under 5,000. Trim before adding next cycle.
